name: Moloco MCM
description: This destination sends user events to Moloco MCM for machine learning and ad attribution.

platformName.description: Name of the platform (default to the `Platform ID`)
platformName.label: Platform Name

apiKey.description: The API key for the platform
apiKey.label: API Key

channel_type.description: Type of channel, either APP or SITE. Defaults to SITE.
channel_type.label: Channel Type

actions.name: Add to Cart
actions.description: Represents a user adding an item to their cart

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: Unique ID generated by the client to suppress duplicate events. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

event_id.title: Event ID
event_id.description: Unique ID generated by the client to suppress duplicate events. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp that the event happened at.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp that the event happened at.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: User Identifier for the platform. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

user_id.title: User ID
user_id.description: User Identifier for the platform. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Device
fields.description: Device information of the event

os.title: OS
os.description: OS of the device. "ios" or "android" must be included for the APP channel type.

os_version.title: OS Version
os_version.description: Device OS version, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., "14.4.1")

advertising_id.title: Advertising ID
advertising_id.description: For app traffic, IDFA of iOS or ADID of android should be filled in this field. (e.g., 7acefbed-d1f6-4e4e-aa26-74e93dd017e4)

unique_device_id.title: Unique Device ID
unique_device_id.description:
For app traffic, a unique identifier for the device being used should be provided in this field.
  Clients can issue identifiers for their user devices or use their IDFV values if using iOS apps.
  The length of this id should not exceed 128 characters.

model.title: Model
model.description: Device model, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., "iPhone 11 Pro")

ua.title: User Agent
ua.description: User Agent. (e.g., "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_4_2 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile/111FFF")

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

session_id.title: Session ID
session_id.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Default Currency
fields.description: The default currency value. Defaults to "USD". If this is set, it will be used as a default currency value for items.

default_currency.title: Default Currency
default_currency.description: The default currency value. Defaults to "USD". If this is set, it will be used as a default currency value for items.

fields.label: Items
fields.description: Item information list related to the event.

items.title: Items
items.description: Item information list related to the event.

price.title: Price
price.description: Monetary amount without currency, e.g. 12.34. This field is required if the Currency field is populated.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency information. This field is required if the Price field is populated.

fields.label: Page ID
fields.description: A string value used to uniquely identify a page. For example: "electronics", "categories/12312", "azd911d" or "/classes/foo/lectures/bar".

page_id.title: Page ID
page_id.description: A string value used to uniquely identify a page. For example: "electronics", "categories/12312", "azd911d" or "/classes/foo/lectures/bar".

fields.label: Page Identifier Tokens
fields.description: Tokens that can be used to identify a page. Alternative to page_id with a lower priority.

page_identifier_tokens.title: Page Identifier Tokens
page_identifier_tokens.description: Tokens that can be used to identify a page. Alternative to page_id with a lower priority.

actions.name: Add to Wishlist
actions.description: Represents a user adding an item to their wishlist
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" and event = "Product Added to Wishlist"

os_version.description: Device OS version, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., "14.4.1")

advertising_id.title: Advertising ID
advertising_id.description: For app traffic, IDFA of iOS or ADID of android should be filled in this field. (e.g., 7acefbed-d1f6-4e4e-aa26-74e93dd017e4)

unique_device_id.title: Unique Device ID
unique_device_id.description:
For app traffic, a unique identifier for the device being used should be provided in this field.
  Clients can issue identifiers for their user devices or use their IDFV values if using iOS apps.
  The length of this id should not exceed 128 characters.

model.title: Model
model.description: Device model, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., "iPhone 11 Pro")

ua.title: User Agent
ua.description: User Agent. (e.g., "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_4_2 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile/111FFF")

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

session_id.title: Session ID
session_id.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Default Currency
fields.description: The default currency value. Defaults to "USD". If this is set, it will be used as a default currency value for items.

default_currency.title: Default Currency
default_currency.description: The default currency value. Defaults to "USD". If this is set, it will be used as a default currency value for items.

fields.label: Items
fields.description: Item information list related to the event.

items.title: Items
items.description: Item information list related to the event.

price.title: Price
price.description: Monetary amount without currency, e.g. 12.34. This field is required if the Currency field is populated.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency information. This field is required if the Price field is populated.

fields.label: Search Query
fields.description: Query string for the search.

fields.label: Page ID
fields.description: A string value used to uniquely identify a page. For example: "electronics", "categories/12312", "azd911d" or "/classes/foo/lectures/bar".

page_id.title: Page ID
page_id.description: A string value used to uniquely identify a page. For example: "electronics", "categories/12312", "azd911d" or "/classes/foo/lectures/bar".

fields.label: Page Identifier Tokens
fields.description: Tokens that can be used to identify a page. Alternative to page_id with a lower priority.

page_identifier_tokens.title: Page Identifier Tokens
page_identifier_tokens.description: Tokens that can be used to identify a page. Alternative to page_id with a lower priority.

fields.label: Referrer Page ID
fields.description: Similar to referrer in HTTP, this value indicates from which page the user came to the current page.

referrer_page_id.title: Referrer Page ID
referrer_page_id.description: Similar to referrer in HTTP, this value indicates from which page the user came to the current page.

presets.name: Add to Wishlist
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event = "Product Added to Wishlist"
